msg: OPEN $RKLB (space/launch theme): vertically integrated small-launch leader with (1) Neutron reusable medium-lift coming online, (2) a fast-growing Space Systems segment now over half of revenue, (3) a defense backlog that de-risks the next two years. Cadence and margins both inflecting. Sizing this as a core long.

OPEN $CRDO (AI interconnect): the only pure-play on active electrical cables as hyperscalers move to 800G/1.6T. (1) design wins ramping at two of the big three, (2) gross margin expanding past 60%, (3) optionality on optical DSP. This is a high-conviction multi-quarter hold for me.

Alpha + Omega Power long idea $AEHR — long-runway thesis on burn-in/test for SiC and AI compute. Multi-paragraph DD: secular test attach rate, customer concentration easing, gross margin recovery into the back half. Taking this as a high-conviction core position.

OPENING $HOOD (BROADENING PLATFORM). Mcap mid-cap, crypto + futures + retirement attach all compounding. Read-through from the brokerage cohort is strong and net interest revenue gives downside support. A legitimate platform compounder here.
This will join the 'Prospective Positions' group at a starter weight @ $58.40 — $SOFI, durable deposit growth funding the lending engine.
OPENING $NBIS ahead of the GPU cloud ramp; structured thesis on neocloud capacity and Nvidia partnership read-through.
OPEN $IOT — taking a stab at Samsara around the 21DMA ahead of the print Thursday
i opened a small swing trade position in $RDDT — short-term momentum play on the ad re-rate, nothing more
bought todays IPO $CRCL here at $32.10 for a quick swing, IPOs have been running
started a small starter in $OSCR, mid-level conviction swing for this regime, do your own dd
grabbed a 1.5% stab at $PLTR here, just a tactical add into the dip
PORTFOLIO UPDATE - 21 POSITIONS — 92:8 EQUITY:OPTIONS RATIO. Posting the full ledger for transparency.
FDA GRANTS PRIORITY REVIEW TO $SRPT GENE THERAPY
Not sure what drove the intraday fade in $AFRM today; if folks are pointing at the short report, that overhang has been known for months and the claims look weak. Holding through it.
$NET is approaching its 50-week moving average near $95. This is a bottom-fishing setup so it may take time to base. I like the risk/reward but no position yet.
fyi.... $MU INTeresting given the HBM commentary on the call today
tailwind for the $AVGO piece here, just color
